ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wetlands" (
  "wetland_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wetland */,
  "wetland_name" TEXT /* Name of the wetland */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the wetland */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wetland */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the wetland was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the wetland information was last updated */,
  "wetland_type" TEXT /* Type of wetland (e.g., freshwater, brackish) */,
  "size_acres" REAL /* Size of the wetland in acres */,
  "ecosystem_type" TEXT /* Type of ecosystem (e.g., marsh, swamp) */,
  "protected_status" TEXT /* Protected status of the wetland (e.g., national park, conservation area) */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last comprehensive survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wetland_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "wetland_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wetland where the station is located */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station within the wetland */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of station (e.g., fixed, mobile) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation of the station above sea level */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the station was last maintained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_wetland_id FOREIGN KEY ("wetland_id") REFERENCES wetlands ("wetland_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "depth_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each depth measurement */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the measurement was taken */,
  "min_depth_m" REAL /* Minimum depth of water in meters */,
  "mean_depth_m" REAL /* Mean depth of water in meters */,
  "median_depth_m" REAL /* Median depth of water in meters */,
  "max_depth_m" REAL /* Maximum depth of water in meters */,
  "depth_standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the depth measurements */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the depth data (e.g., manual, sensor) */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag to indicate data reliability (e.g., good, suspect, bad) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_depth_measurements_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., flood, drought) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event's impact on the wetland */,
  "response_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken in response to the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_duration" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the event occurred */,
  "duration_days" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in days */,
  "num_events" INTEGER /* Number of events of this type at the station */,
  "average_depth" REAL /* Average depth during the event */,
  "peak_depth" REAL /* Peak depth during the event */,
  "event_cause" TEXT /* Cause of the event (e.g., heavy rainfall, dam release) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "wetland_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wetland where the data was recorded */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the weather data was recorded */,
  "temperature_c" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "precipitation_mm" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity */,
  "wind_speed_m_s" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation in watts per square meter */,
  "pressure_hpa" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hectopascals */,
  "cloud_cover_percentage" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_wetland_id FOREIGN KEY ("wetland_id") REFERENCES wetlands ("wetland_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soil_moisture" (
  "moisture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil moisture data entry */,
  "wetland_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wetland where the data was recorded */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the soil moisture data was recorded */,
  "moisture_percentage" REAL /* Soil moisture percentage */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil (e.g., clay, loam) */,
  "moisture_depth_m" REAL /* Depth at which the soil moisture was measured */,
  "moisture_sample_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure soil moisture (e.g., TDR, gravimetric) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moisture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_moisture_wetland_id FOREIGN KEY ("wetland_id") REFERENCES wetlands ("wetland_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., field technician, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "wetland_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wetland being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed (time of day) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_wetland_id FOREIGN KEY ("wetland_id") REFERENCES wetlands ("wetland_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "wetland_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wetland the file belongs to */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, TXT) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the file was last modified */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data file (e.g., field, lab) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_wetland_id FOREIGN KEY ("wetland_id") REFERENCES wetlands ("wetland_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the sensor data was recorded */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor data was recorded */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., depth sensor, temperature sensor) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value recorded by the sensor */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor used */,
  "sensor_calibrated_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "sensor_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)
